topics.title: Accounting Concepts and Conventions
examination_focus: Business entity, going concern and accrual

topics.typical_question_style: post journal entries to ledger and balance accounts

examination_focus: Single, double and three-column cash book

examination_focus: Bad debts and provision for doubtful debts

topics.title: Company and Partnership Accounts
examination_focus: Partnership: capital, drawings and profit sharing

topics.title: Accounting Ratios and Interpretation
topics.typical_question_style: calculate and interpret current and quick ratios

topics.title: Funds Flow, Cash Flow and Incomplete Records
examination_focus: Single entry to double entry conversion
topics.typical_question_style: prepare cash flow statement from given financial statements

topics.title: Manufacturing Accounts
examination_focus: Finished goods and cost of production
topics.typical_question_style: prepare manufacturing account for a production company

topics.title: Control Accounts and Depreciation
examination_focus: Sales and purchases ledger control accounts
